one_law: Every agent discussing ANY task or plan must run the tiny validation pipeline — not only on NEXT TASK trigger. Validate before proceed.

pipeline.name: task_plan_validation_v1
pipeline.always_when: founder or agent message discusses a task, plan, work order, backlog item, or next step

priority_stack.label: Founder form picks + nerve cascade
priority_stack.because: Official form batch submit is the only lawful desired-state writer

priority_stack.label: Cloud FORGE revenue lane (full motor)
priority_stack.because: phase_market ·  evidence → labs rows · market traction

priority_stack.label: Noetfield freemium cloud bay
priority_stack.because: Phase 0 north star — freemium before paid

priority_stack.label: TrustField sandbox + outreach (TF agent lane)
priority_stack.because: Steps 6–7 demos/outreach — not Mac Worker body

priority_stack.label: Brain / governance meta rows
priority_stack.because: Useful only when tied to cloud federated proof or buyer-visible output

required_founder_question: What is the real-world output supposed to be? (file · marketing system · AI agent product · data pipeline · internal meta · other)
forbidden_always: Discussing or executing a task/plan without validation pipeline sections
Marking cloud_proof without real-world output class
Treating internal_meta receipt as product progress
forbidden_when_triggered: Executing next queue row without validation pipeline
Long plan status without usefulness verdict
